headline: FirstEnergy Names Three Senior Leaders to Drive Operational, Safety and Technology Performance
summary: FirstEnergy Corp. (NYSE: FE) recently named three senior leaders to strengthen operational performance, advance its safety culture and accelerate enterprise-wide technology transformation: Chris Beam as President, West Virginia/Maryland Operations; Hanneke Counts as Vice President, Environmental Health and Safety; and Daniel Puscas as Chief Information Officer.

headline: FirstEnergy Ohio Electric Companies Ready to Respond to Potential Outages
summary: FirstEnergy Ohio electric companies Ohio Edison, Toledo Edison and The Illuminating Company are closely monitoring and prepared to quickly respond to any outages caused by severe weather expected to move through the state Wednesday evening.

headline: FirstEnergy Pennsylvania Crews Preparing for Fourth Round of Severe Storms
summary: FirstEnergy Pennsylvania Electric Company (FE PA) – a FirstEnergy Corp. (NYSE: FE) company known locally as Penn Power, Penelec, Met-Ed and West Penn Power – is preparing for another round of severe weather expected to move through the state Wednesday night and Thursday, marking the fourth significant storm system in the past 12 days.
